text: who amasses wealth ňĻgreedilyňļ and counts it ňĻrepeatedlyňļ,
thinking that their wealth will make them immortal!
Not at all! Such a person will certainly be tossed into the Crusher.
And what will make you realize what the Crusher is?
It will be sealed over them,
ňĻtightly securedňļ with long braces. <sup foot_note=1327>1327</sup>

foot_notes.1327: Other possible translations: 1. ‚ÄúThe Fire will be in towering columns.‚ÄĚ 2. ‚ÄúThey will be tied to long pillars.‚ÄĚ
